description: ReachStream is a B2B data platform with 120M+ verified contacts, advanced filters, and a built-in email verifier.
tagline: B2B data platform with verified contacts
overview: ReachStream helps sales, marketing, and recruitment teams build targeted lists from more than 120 million verified business contacts across 150+ countries, with a built-in email verifier.
what_is: ReachStream is a B2B sales and marketing data platform for lead generation and contact discovery. It offers more than 120 million verified profiles across 150-plus countries, with 20+ data insights, advanced filters, and a built-in email verifier.

It works best for teams building targeted lists and improving outreach, with free monthly leads to start and list building in minutes. ReachStream integrates with CRMs and email platforms via its API and Chrome extension, and focuses on B2B lead data rather than general CRM functions.
